description_long: This object consists of three robust, rectangular containers placed side by side, each with a military or industrial aesthetic. The containers have a dark green to black color palette, with reinforced edges and two prominent horizontal bands across the top. The front face of each container features a detailed locking mechanism with a keypad and red indicator, suggesting secure access. The sides are relatively plain, with a small circular indicator light and a recessed panel, while the back is featureless and solid. The containers appear to be constructed from heavy-duty metal, likely designed for secure storage or transport of valuable or sensitive items in urban or tactical environments.
description: A set of three heavy-duty, dark green and black rectangular containers with reinforced edges and secure keypad locks on the front.
description_view_0: Front view showing the three containers' locking mechanisms, keypads, and reinforced structure.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the containers' depth, small indicator lights, and recessed panels.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the plain, solid backs of the containers with no visible openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, with indicator lights and recessed panels visible.
attribute_labeling_or_signage: keypad and indicator lights on front; no other visible labels
